subject: hattori_hanzo
object: Commanded the shogunate's yoriki officers and 200 civil officials after Ieyasu's move to the Kantō region.

subject: hattori_hanzo
object: Retired as a Buddhist monk and founded Sainen-ji temple in Edo (now Shinjuku Tokyo) where he is buried.
